_note: Token values confirmed from Figma MCP extraction for both default and filled states.

--button/secondary/bg-default.description: Track background fill. Same in both states.

--button/default/bg-default.description: Thumb background fill. Same in both states.

--text/invert.description: Label text color. mix-blend-difference is applied so it inverts against the thumb and track backgrounds.

--font-family/headings.description: Label font family. NOTE: This component uses the headings font, not the body font.

borderRadius.description: Applied to both track and thumb for full pill shape.

trackPadding.description: Inner padding of the track on all sides.

filled._note: Confirmed. Thumb width: 358px (fills full inner track area).

disabled._note: TODO: Not defined in Figma. Confirm appearance and token values.

focus._note: TODO: Not defined in Figma. Confirm focus ring treatment.
